description: Style NoteStreet fashion fresh off the streets, referencing local culture and infusing it with a blast of ramp style - that's what tokyo talkies is known for. This super soft tee, crafted from luxe fabric is the perfect summer top you've been looking for, with its print details and a drapey silhouette. Pair with with a colour pop pair of denims or itsy bitsy shorts to beat the summer heat!Product DetailsHot pink scoop neck top, has short sleeves and print on the chestMaterial and Care100% cottonWash using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm iron but do not iron on decoratioSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
